---
name: Template improvement
about: The .readmeAI works but something could be clearer, more concise, or better structured
title: "[TEMPLATE] "
labels: template
assignees: ""
---

## What section needs improvement

Name the section (e.g., "AI PROTOCOL", "CONVENTIONS", "PROGRESS").

## Current version

Paste the current text of that section.

## Proposed version

Paste your improved version.

## Why this is better

Explain the improvement. Examples of good reasons:
- "The current wording is ambiguous — the AI sometimes interprets it as X when it should mean Y"
- "This section is 3x longer than it needs to be; here's the same information in fewer words"
- "The table format makes it hard to scan; a list is clearer here"
- "I tested both versions and the AI followed the new version more consistently"

## AI assistant tested with

If you tested both versions, note which AI you used and what changed.
